name: Strawberry Apple Frost
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Strawberries, very ripe (reserve 2 whole strawberries)
1/3 cup Apple juice, no sugar added
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except reserved berries in the blender container.
2. Blend until frothy.
3. Divide mixture into 2 stemmed glasses.
4. Garnish each serving with a reserved strawberry.
Per serving: 134 calories, 4 g protein, 4 g fat; 19 g carbohydrate, 53 g sodium
SERVES: 2
SOURCE: Weight Watchers 365-Day Menu Cookbook
